For that to happen we must ensure the worlds can handle a great amount of boats all at once.<br>We have already done internal testing,  but to be extra sure we would like to confirm our tests with real players as well., Why should I play the Sailing Load Test?, By participating you are helping the development team by spotting potential issues before Sailing's launch. In turn,  this will mean the real launch of Sailing should go smoother. Thank you for helping out!, What can I do in the Load Test?, We understand that Sailing around in circles while the devs monitor server performance can seem a bit pointless. So we have made it not pointless! There's a time trial for making your way around the Pandemonium,  and every time you do,  you get a point. Please share your Personal Best with us in the Sailing Discord!, When will Sailing launch?, We hope for Sailing to be ready <col=FF981F>later this year</col>,  if all goes well!], [7542], [5816], [Resetting will clear all progress.
